cenas.dalle_prompt: A person is sitting on the floor. A small-to-medium sized dog is nearby. The person pats their lap invitingly. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot establishing the safe, low-level starting position.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person uses a treat to lure the dog to place its front paws on their lap. The moment the paws touch, the person gives the treat and praise. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up on the paws making contact with the lap, followed by the immediate reward.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person now says a cue like "Colo!" and pats their lap. The dog jumps fully into their lap. Jackpot reward and lots of affection. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A slow-motion shot of the dog jumping into the lap. A heart animation appears as the dog lands, symbolizing the affection.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person is now sitting on a low sofa. They give the cue, and the dog successfully jumps from the floor onto their lap on the sofa. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera captures the jump from a side angle, showing the change in height and the dog's successful adaptation.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog curled up comfortably and happily in its owner's lap, a perfect picture of trust and affection. Text overlay: "Colo: O Melhor Lugar do Mundo". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A warm, intimate close-up shot of the dog and owner cuddling. The text appears in a soft, loving font.
